---
title: "Open Stats Lab One-way ANOVA in R Using Data from Harvie et al. (2015)"
authors:
  - admin
date: "2018-11-19"
slug: osl-harvie-et-al-2015
categories:
  - R
  - Tutorial
tags:
  - anova
  - repeated measures
  - pairwise comparisons
  - open data
image:
  caption: ""
  focal_point: ""
---
